texto: The quest for self improvement and personal growth is now an integral part of my life. I’m always looking for ways to increase my capacity to grow, develop and achieve more.And that means, I’m willing to read, observe, listen, discuss, research and do whatever it takes to become a better improved me. I hope you are too.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Murali Murthy sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “The quest for self improvement and personal growth is now an integral part of my life. I’m always…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, business-success, growth, útil em momentos de growth e self-improvement.

frase_original: The quest for self improvement and personal growth is now an integral part of my life. I’m always looking for ways to increase my capacity to grow, develop and achieve more.And that means, I’m willing to read, observe, listen, discuss, research and do whatever it takes to become a better improved me. I hope you are too.
